1:46651.name: Header Description
1:46651.characters: "I joined SwaaS as a mid-level engineer. The FTR framework and POD model gave me clarity on what good engineering looks like. Two years later, I'm leading a product pod and mentoring junior devs."

value.characters: Make decisions. Fix problems. We trust people to own the outcome, not hand them a checklist.
